Headline: Blue Line Service Running with Delays
ShortDescription: Blue Line trains are running, but with extended wait times. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Blue Line trains are running, but with extended wait times. Some riders may experience wait times of up to 30 minutes while our crews work to restore regular service levels.

Use trackers to look for live arrival information and consider available alternatives, such a local bus routes or buses to/from other 'L' lines.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #N5 Temporary Reroute near 75th/Exchange
ShortDescription: #N5 South Shore Night Buses temp. rerouted in both direction due street blockage near 75th/Exchange.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#N5 South Shore Night Buses temporarily rerouted in both direction due street blockage near 75th/Exchange.

Eastbound buses buses 75th, Exchange, 79th and South Shore then resume their normal route. 

Westbound buses 75th, Exchange, 73rd, Yates and 75th then resume their normal route.

Allow extra travel time.
